title: Hello World — Building in Public
summary: Why I built this blog, what I'll write about, and the engineering decisions behind this site.
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const i={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",h2:"h2",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components},{Callout:o}=i;return o||function(e,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}("Callout",!0),t(e,{children:[n(i.p,{children:"Welcome. After years of accumulating drafts in Notion and threads in private Slack channels, I decided it was time to build a proper home for my writing."}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"why-another-blog",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#why-another-blog",children:"Why another blog?"})}),"
",t(i.p,{children:["Most developer blogs are either generated from a template in 10 minutes or over-engineered to the point where the author never actually writes anything. I wanted something in between — a place that feels ",n(i.em,{children:"crafted"}),", but never gets in the way of the writing."]}),"
",n(o,{type:"info",children:t(i.p,{children:["This blog is fully open source. Press ",n(i.strong,{children:"⌘ K"})," to open the command palette and search anything on the site."]})}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"what-ill-write-about",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#what-ill-write-about",children:"What I’ll write about"})}),"
",t(i.ul,{children:["
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Systems design"})," — scalability decisions, distributed systems trade-offs, architecture reviews."]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Frontend engineering"})," — React, Next.js, performance, and the craft of building UIs."]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Engineering culture"})," — team structures, code reviews, on-call, and the invisible labour of software."]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Tools I build"})," — small utilities, scripts, and experiments."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.h2,{id:"the-stack",children:n(i.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-stack",children:"The stack"})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"This site is built with:"}),"
",n(i.pre,{children:n(i.code,{className:"language-ts",children:'const nextConfig = {
  output: "export",
  images: { unoptimized: true },
};
'})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"Everything is statically generated at build time. No database, no server, no cold starts. Just HTML on a CDN."}),"
",n(i.hr,{}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"Thanks for reading. More soon."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Why I Rewrote Our Build System (And What I Learned)
summary: A deep-dive into migrating a 300k-line monorepo from a bespoke Makefile + Bash pipeline to Turborepo, the trade-offs we made, and the lessons that surprised us.
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const t={a:"a",code:"code",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...i.components},{Callout:a,FileTree:l,Steps:c,Terminal:o}=t;return a||_missingMdxReference("Callout",!0),l||_missingMdxReference("FileTree",!0),c||_missingMdxReference("Steps",!0),o||_missingMdxReference("Terminal",!0),r(e,{children:[n(t.p,{children:"Our build system was six years old. It worked — in the same way a 1998 Honda Civic with 300,000 miles “works”. You could get from A to B, but every journey carried existential dread."}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"the-legacy-system",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-legacy-system",children:"The legacy system"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Here’s what we were dealing with:"}),"
",n(l,{children:".
├── Makefile          # 2,400 lines, 0 comments
├── scripts/
│   ├── build.sh      # Called from Make, calls Python, calls Node
│   ├── test.sh       # 14 environment variables, 3 undocumented
│   └── deploy.sh     # Everyone is afraid of this file
└── ci/
  └── pipeline.yml  # 8 minutes on a warm cache, 23 minutes cold"}),"
",n(a,{type:"warn",children:r(t.p,{children:["Before migrating any build system in production, make sure you have at least ",n(t.strong,{children:"one week"})," of baseline metrics: build times, cache hit rates, failure rates. You cannot prove improvement without a baseline."]})}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"why-turborepo",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#why-turborepo",children:"Why Turborepo"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"I evaluated three options:"}),"
",r(t.table,{children:[n(t.thead,{children:r(t.tr,{children:[n(t.th,{children:"Tool"}),n(t.th,{children:"Remote cache"}),n(t.th,{children:"Incremental"}),n(t.th,{children:"Learning curve"})]})}),r(t.tbody,{children:[r(t.tr,{children:[n(t.td,{children:"Turborepo"}),n(t.td,{children:"✅ native"}),n(t.td,{children:"✅ task-level"}),n(t.td,{children:"Low"})]}),r(t.tr,{children:[n(t.td,{children:"Nx"}),n(t.td,{children:"✅"}),n(t.td,{children:"✅ project-level"}),n(t.td,{children:"Medium"})]}),r(t.tr,{children:[n(t.td,{children:"Bazel"}),n(t.td,{children:"✅"}),n(t.td,{children:"✅ file-level"}),n(t.td,{children:"Extreme"})]})]})]}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"For a team of 12 engineers who needed to be productive from day one, Turborepo was the obvious choice."}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"the-migration",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-migration",children:"The migration"})}),"
",r(c,{children:[n(t.h3,{id:"audit-your-task-graph",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#audit-your-task-graph",children:"Audit your task graph"})}),n(t.p,{children:"Before writing a single line of config, map your build graph manually. I used a whiteboard and coloured markers."}),n(t.h3,{id:"set-up-the-workspace",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#set-up-the-workspace",children:"Set up the workspace"})}),n(t.pre,{children:n(t.code,{className:"language-json",children:'{
  "$schema": "https://turbo.build/schema.json",
  "tasks": {
    "build": {
      "dependsOn": ["^build"],
      "outputs": ["dist/**", ".next/**"]
    }
  }
}
'})}),n(t.h3,{id:"migrate-scripts-incrementally",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#migrate-scripts-incrementally",children:"Migrate scripts incrementally"})}),n(t.p,{children:"Never do a big-bang migration. Wrap each old script in a Turbo task one at a time, verify behaviour matches, merge."}),n(t.h3,{id:"enable-remote-caching",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#enable-remote-caching",children:"Enable remote caching"})}),n(t.p,{children:"This is where the real wins appear. Our CI went from 23 minutes to 4 minutes on cache hits."})]}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"results",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#results",children:"Results"})}),"
",n(o,{children:'$ turbo build --filter="[HEAD^1]"
• Packages in scope: 3
• Running build in 3 packages
• Remote cache hit: 47 tasks
• Local computation: 3 tasks
✓ Done in 41s'}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The numbers:"}),"
",r(t.ul,{children:["
",r(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Mean CI time:"})," 23 min → 4 min (83% reduction)"]}),"
",r(t.li,{children:[n(t.strong,{children:"Cache hit rate (month 3):"})," 84%"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(t.h2,{id:"what-surprised-me",children:n(t.a,{className:"anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#what-surprised-me",children:"What surprised me"})}),"
",r(t.p,{children:["The biggest surprise was not the time savings. It was the ",n(t.strong,{children:"psychological effect"})," on the team. When builds are fast, engineers run them more often. When engineers run them more often, they catch bugs earlier. The feedback loop compounds."]}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Fast builds are a culture investment, not just a tooling investment."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:r}=e.components||{};return r?n(r,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};function _missingMdxReference(e,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}
